description.value:
Market-oath receipts sealed in wax — Sangøymål market-keepers once pressed their most binding contracts with a waxed seal bearing a single resonant phrase; the implement carries that phrase, letting the wielder claim a second chance at the negotiating table.

Effect: Once per respite, reroll a failed test made to negotiate a stated bargain. You must keep the new result.

Rules: Tests; Reroll; Respite.

project.prerequisites: An implement of at least basic quality; a market-oath receipt from Sangøy, sealed in original wax
